creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
The machine info on http://www.freebsd.org/internal/about.html is
out of date.  I've got the updated info from internal/machines.html.
Additionally, remove the links to the Analog usage stats, they were last
updated in 2004 and it doesn't sound like they are coming back any time
soon.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
